---
name: "🚀 Feature Request"
about: Propose a new feature, optimization, or clinical engine enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

### 💡 Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. E.g. "I am frustrated when trying to track rare blood compatibility..."

### 🌟 Describe the Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Describe the UI component, backend API endpoint, or forecasting logic.

### 🔄 Describe Alternatives You've Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

### 📋 User Story or Impact
Who does this feature benefit? (e.g. patients, coordinators, blood bank admins) What is the projected real-world impact?

### ❓ Additional Context
Add any other context, wireframes, or references to the RaktaSetu blueprints here.
